name: studio-ui
description: Jami.Studio UI foundation: token system, primitive registry, workbench overlay, CLI, renderer, and suite packs.

scripts.verify: node scripts/docs/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/contracts/validate-contracts.mjs && node scripts/contracts/generate-contract-artifacts.mjs --check && node scripts/release/publish-dry-run.mjs && node scripts/release/generate-release-artifacts.mjs --check && node scripts/release/hosted-route-smoke.mjs && node --test packages/ui/test/ui.test.mjs packages/ui/test/radix-react-wrappers.test.mjs packages/ui/test/suites.test.mjs && node --test packages/renderer/test/render.test.mjs packages/renderer/test/presentation.test.mjs && node --test packages/cli/test/cli.test.mjs && node --test apps/workbench/test/workbench.test.mjs
